title: Reuse prior context and research before asking David to repeat himself
details: Codex should avoid making David restate context and avoid rerunning broad research that already exists. Before discussing or building similar things, future agents should search MEMORY.md, system/continuity-memory, system/agent-reports, docs/specs, docs/research, research briefs, canonical surfaces, and recent commits for prior decisions and evidence. After a discussion establishes durable intent, the agent should write a compact memory packet or update the relevant canonical context, then commit and push only owned files. This should be encoded in context-continuity once the active overlapping continuity claim is resolved.
